reviews.comment:
Es una Estación de servicios céntrica, donde su personal tiene buena atención. Le faltaría tener una salida hacia calle 25 de Mayo para los que deseen retomar ésa calle.

(Translated by Google)
It's a centrally located gas station with good customer service. It would benefit from an exit onto 25 de Mayo Street for those wishing to return to that street.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVOTlMa2JnEAE

reviews.comment:
